title: Fiery Grilled Moroccan Lamb Kebabs
description: Salty, chewy, and adventurous Moroccan dish featuring sesame seed and temper, this halal-friendly recipe is perfect for a dinner party. The combination of spices and the binchotan grill gives it a unique flavor.
instructions: Preheat the binchotan grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked through.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional sesame seeds and lemon wedges if desired.
